services.heading: How it works

steps.title: 1. Send us your product
steps.text: Ship a sample and set an affiliate commission on TikTok Shop. Supplements and wellness products are our specialty — it's where our audience already buys.

steps.title: 2. We create review content
steps.text: Our creators produce review videos built around what actually converts on TikTok Shop — hooks, demos, and honest takes.

steps.title: 3. You watch GMV climb
steps.text: Content goes live across our network, and every attributed sale is verified in your own TikTok Shop Seller Center — not our slides. Full transparency.

services.note: Every engagement is performance-aligned — we earn the most when your product sells. We onboard a limited number of products each month, so category fit matters.

partnership.heading: Ways to partner
partnership.sub: Three engagement models. Every one of them keeps us invested in your sales — pick the level of priority your launch deserves.

tiers.name: Performance
tiers.text: Set an elevated, network-exclusive commission rate and your product enters our content rotation. You pay on attributed sales — the higher the rate, the higher your priority.

tiers.name: Retainer + Performance
tiers.text: A monthly retainer guarantees review videos and posting cadence across our accounts — plus commission on every sale. Predictable content output, fully aligned incentives.

tiers.name: Exclusive
tiers.text: One brand per category. We never promote your competitors — your products own the niche across our entire network. Retainer + commission + performance bonuses.

contact.heading: Work with us
contact.subheading: Tell us about your product. We reply to every brand inquiry within 24 hours.
